summary.zh: 合成产品路演样例已具备 source、Web Deck、封面截图和交付检查清单；重点证明首屏叙事、产品流程和公开展示路径。
summary.en: Synthetic product pitch proof includes source, Web Deck, cover screenshot, and delivery checklist.

checks.summary: Source brief includes product one-liner, user pain, proof, roadmap, and ask.
Web Deck starter is designed for public demo rhythm and mobile readability.
Preset declares expected artifacts, review commands, and acceptance criteria.
